user.title: CHMI measured data station
user.description: Paste a CHMI station URL, choose the station type (groundwater, surface water, air quality, meteorological), and choose the update mode.

data_description.station_family: Choose whether the URL points to a groundwater, surface-water, air-quality, or meteorological station.
data_description.update_mode: Use 'daily_time' for one fetch per day at the selected local time, or 'interval' for periodic polling.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure CHMI measured data station
reconfigure.description: Change the CHMI station URL or station type (groundwater, surface water, air quality, meteorological). Update schedule remains in Options.

data_description.station_family: Choose whether the URL points to a groundwater, surface-water, air-quality, or meteorological station.

schedule_daily.title: Daily update time
schedule_daily.description: Choose the local time when CHMI data should be fetched each day.

schedule_interval.title: Update interval
schedule_interval.description: Choose how often CHMI data should be fetched.

error.no_snow_data: Meteorological station does not provide snow data (snow entity is required)
error.url_type_mismatch: CHMI URL type does not match selected station type
error.url_profile_mismatch: Selected measurement type does not match the CHMI URL
error.profile_type_mismatch: Selected measurement type does not match selected station type
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to CHMI or load station data

error.url_profile_mismatch: Selected station type does not match the CHMI URL
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to CHMI or load station data

data_description.station_url: You can change the CHMI station URL here (the station type of this integration stays the same).
data_description.update_mode: Choose whether data are fetched once per day at a fixed local time, or periodically in minute intervals.
